context:
TRAIN ITINERARY

Passenger: Sofia Mendes
Route: Bordeaux Saint-Jean → Paris Montparnasse
Date: Tuesday, April 14

Train 8422
Departure: 07:46
Arrival: 09:58
Coach: 6
Seat: 42A
Ticket type: Flexible Business

Business lounge access is included at Bordeaux Saint-Jean. The ticket may be changed without a fee before departure, but any fare difference must be paid. Breakfast can be collected from the café counter in coach 4 after 08:00.

context:
Team Chat — Website Launch

09:12 Maya: The product pages are ready, but the new photographs are still missing from three items.
09:14 Louis: The photographer sent a download link last night. I can upload them before lunch.
09:16 Maya: Great. Please also check the mobile layout. The price button looked too wide on my phone.
09:20 Louis: I will test it on Android and ask Nina to check iOS.
09:22 Nina: I can do that at 1:30. I am finishing the newsletter first.
09:24 Maya: Perfect. We will keep the 4:00 p.m. launch unless either test reveals a serious issue.

items.prompt: What is missing from the product pages?
items.explanation: Trois produits n'ont pas encore leurs photographies.

context:
CITY BUSINESS JOURNAL

Local software company Aerion Data has opened a second office in Nantes, creating thirty new positions in engineering and customer support. The company currently employs 120 people at its original Rennes location.

According to Chief Executive Claire Dubois, Nantes was selected because of its strong technology sector and direct rail connections to Paris. Aerion plans to begin recruiting immediately and expects the new office to be fully staffed by the end of the year.

The company also announced that it will continue expanding its Rennes research team.

items.explanation: L'article annonce l'ouverture d'un deuxième bureau et des recrutements.
